title: tephrosia travancorica
intro: Tephrosia travancorica, also known as Travancore tephrosia or Travancore milkpea, is a plant species native to India, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tephrosia travancorica is often prepared as an herbal decoction or powder for medicinal use, which can be consumed orally to harness its therapeutic properties.
